ddt:Target.Name: PLC_ECU_V2.63
ddt:Target.Description:
CPLC DDTdatabase
V2.63 22/06/2020 Deletion of autoident : - 0600 - REX10_0u0_430_002 - REX10_0u0_440_000
******************** HISTORY ******************** V1.0 05/07/2017 : Creation and compliance with DTS V1.1
V1.1 06/10/2017: Updates as per the reactivity table, DTC updates. Tool IDs changed to place under the folder $97
V1.2 15/03/2018: Missing configuration DTC $AB0455 added
DID $0101 and $0206 deleted
CPLC_ChargingSession-data coding changed from 1 bit to 2 bit
DID $0340,$0341 and $0342 added
data length modified for DID $0343
Bit coding modified for IO control $0341
V1.3 30/04/2018: Updated as per Diagnosis resources PLC_V1.7.xls
DID $0338 ->coding changed
DID $033A-> coding initial value changed
DID $033E-> initial value modified in coding
DID $0341-> coding value updated,bit info changed from 4 to 5 bit
DID $0343 ->coding value deleted for value 2
$0344,$0347,$0345,$0346 ,$0356,$0357,$0360 DID added
IO control $0341-> controlEnableMaskRecord#1[] updated
Identification ID $F188 added
V1.4 7-Jun-2018 DID $0348 added DID $0345, $0346 modified to have 459 bytes. DID $0347 modified.
V1.6 27-Jun-2018 VDIAG value modified to $04
V1.7 10-08-2018 MAC_HOST DID screen correctly added DID $0349 added
V1.8 09-10-2018
$0326 coding modified $0345 screen modified $0338 coding modified
V1.9 14-12-2018
$AB1F descripetion modified as Handshake failure (in V1.8 version the description was protocol version too old)
V2.1 05-02-2019
DID $F1A2 is modified from read only to Read/Write also the write configuration screen is added in identification-Configuration window
V2.2 05-02-2019
DID $0341 is modified from read only to Read/Write also the write configuration screen is added in PLC-Configuration window
V2.3 addinf Auto ident
V2.4 (aligned with Diagnosis resources PLC_V1.11) 09/10/2019
- Adding AutoIdent for SW430 and SW 440 - Adding DID $0365 Vehicle Architecture
V2.5 (9/12/2019) Below Auto idnetifiaction details added : a. Software Reference à 283G04943R , Version à REX10_0u0_431_000 b. Software Reference à 283G01279R , Version à REX10_0u0_431_000
Errors in database report corrected .
V2.6 20/05/2020 $0339 - Updated coding data ,changed DID from R to R/W $033A,$0326,$0343,$032C,$0365 - coding data updated . $0348- Updated Missing info in screen part $0349- updated data- A,B values ,Signed and Unit. $0340 - Coding data - C value updated . Added Digest $FD00 - $FEFF DID's - $F0D0,$F0D1,$033B,$033C,$0326,$032C,$033A,$0340,$0329,$0327,$033E,$033D - marked as Snapshot Auto Identification details added. Updated 1904 service based on Norme_36_00_011_UDS
V2.61 28/05/2020 $0349 - Updated Data to Not numeric / 2 bytes / HEXA & Updated Screen
V2.62 16/06/2020 Deletion of autoident : - REX10_0u0_410_000 - REX10_0u0_420_000 - REX10_0u0_420_010

Data.Name: Status mask

Item.Text: The charging process was aborted by the charging station.

Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal level out of range/zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component | system operation obstructed or blocked

Label.Text: - force configuration to be taken into account
- reset configuration parameters to default values
Key off / key on reset is used to :
- force configuration to be taken into account
Default value (= Flat Profile) is set to $FFE5 = -27 (DEC signed) = -3,375 dB
Example if value read/write is $FFE3 = -29 (DEC signed) ==> Formula : -29 = -27 + X* / 0,125
*X (dB) = Increase or Decrease of AFE Gain Calibration compare to Default value (-3,375 dB)

Button.Text: Read Mileage of the last occurrence counter
